creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dawid Gorecki from comment #23)
> I think that that's all for now. I couldn't find some some of the maintainers'
> accounts on phabricator, so I couldn't add them as reviewers there. I don't
> know what is the proper way to deal with that.

Thanks. For anyone without a Phabricator account I think just send mail to $MAINTAINER, with a link to the review and to this PR.
